# Restocking Fee

The returns policy states that a fifteen percent restocking fee applies to large appliances and custom-configured electronics if they are returned without a manufacturing defect. In contrast, standard catalogue items do not incur a restocking fee when returned.

[Source: returns_policy.md#restocking-fee]
